title: Crypto hardware wallet maker Ledger hires former Circle executive John Andrews as CFO to prepare for potential IPO with valuation possibly above $4 billion
message_html: Crypto hardware wallet maker Ledger hires former Circle executive John Andrews as CFO to prepare for potential IPO with valuation possibly above $4 billion ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Crypto hardware wallet maker Ledger has hired former Circle executive John Andrews as CFO to prepare for a potential IPO, with a valuation possibly above $4 billion. Andrews previously led capital markets and investor relations at Circle and was involved in its IPO pro

title: Starknet to launch STRK20s with testnet next week and mainnet by end of April
message_html: Starknet to launch STRK20s with testnet next week and mainnet by end of April ...
snippet: Starknet (Privacy arc) 🥷 (@Starknet): Wen STRK20s launch? - Testnet next week. - Mainnet by the end of April. With great UX and DeFi integrations from day one.
